Titolo di studio del capo azienda

Sistema di irrigazione unico o prevalente

Modalità di stoccaggio degli effluenti zootecnici

Misure adottate a seguito dellemergenza Covid-19

Tipo di attività agricola (Orientamento tecnico economico)
Ownership and use of mechanical means
Possesso e utilizzo dei mezzi meccanici
Farm manager educational level
Titolo di studio del capo azienda
Single or prevalent irrigation system
Sistema di irrigazione unico o prevalente
Methods of storage of zootechnical effluents

Misure adottate a seguito dellemergenza Covid-19
Use of business management software
Utilizzo di software per la gestione aziendale
Percentage class of expenditure on turnover for public cloud services
Classe % di spesa su fatturato per servizi cloud pubblici
Percentage class of expenditure on turnover for private cloud services
Classe % di spesa su fatturato per servizi cloud privati
Percentage class of expenditure on turnover for cloud services
Classe % di spesa su fatturato per servizi cloud (totale)
Investments in digital technologies made in the last three years
Tipologia di investimento effettuato per tecnologia digitale nell'ultimo triennio
Investments in digital technologies that will be made in the next three years
Tipologia di investimento previsto per tecnologia digitale nel triennio successivo
Nonprofit prevalent sector of activity - ICNPO
Settore di attività prevalente non profit
Revenues in the balance sheet/financial statement
Entrate registrate nel bilancio/rendiconto
Expenditure in the balance sheet/financial statement
Uscite registrate nel bilancio/rendiconto
Activities within its own innovation projects
Attività nell’ambito di propri progetti di innovazione
Percentage class of expenditure on turnover, incurred for innovation projects
Classe % di spesa su fatturato per progetti di innovazione
Digital platforms used by the company to sell goods and/or to provide services
Piattaforme digitali che l’impresa ha utilizzato per vendere beni e/o fornire servizi
Percentage class of turnover obtained from intermediation of digital platforms
Classe % di fatturato ottenuta da piattaforme digitali
Consequences of the use of digital mediation platforms
Conseguenze legate all'utilizzo di piattaforme digitali di intermediazione
Training on the digital technologies adopted in the last three-year period
Attività di formazione sulle tecnologie digitali adottate nell'ultimo triennio
Skill adequately held by the personnel
Competenze digitali possedute dal personale
Staff performance in the relevant areas
Andamento del personale nelle masioni rilevanti
Actions to deal with the consequences on management
Azioni per affrontare le conseguenze sulla gestione
Strategic objectives pursued in the last three years
Obiettivi strategici perseguti negli ultimi tre anni
Strategic objectives pursued in the next three years
Obiettivi strategici da perseguire nei prossimi tre anni
Types of investment in last three years for efficient/sustainable management of energy - transport
Tipo investimento nell'ultimo triennio per gestione efficiente e sostenibile di energia e trasporti
Actions taken to reduce the consumption of natural resources and to manage waste and emissions
Azioni per ridurre il consumo di risorse naturali e gestire in modo sostenibile rifiuti e emissioni
Involvement of suppliers in Italy and-or abroad in initiatives aimed to reduce environmental impact
Coinvolgimento di fornitori in italia o all'estero per ridurre l'impatto anbientale
Solutions adopted, in the last three years, to promote environmental sustainability initiatives
Soluzioni adottate nell'ultimo triennio per promuovere iniziative di sostenibilità amientale
Assessment of the environmental sustainability initiatives carried out in the last three years
Modalità di valutazione di iniziative di sostenibilità ambientale realizzate nell'ultimo triennio
Main reasons to take the actions indicated
Motivazioni delle azioni intraprese
Financial or resource-sharing tools used to pursue the stated objectives
Strumenti usati per conseguire gli obiettivi
How the projects and-or initiatives were funded
Modalità di finanziamento dei progetti e-o delle iniziative
Degree of dependence on all external sources of financing
Grado di dipendenza da fonti esterne
Degree of financial dependence on banks
Grado di dipendenza finanziaria dalle banche
Reasons for using external funding sources
Motivi di utilizzo delle fonti esterne
Number of banks with which a credit relationship has been established
Numero di banche con cui si è stabilito un rapporto creditizio
Share (%) of bank debt held by the main bank
Quota (%) di indebitamento bancario detenuto dalla banca principale
Determining factors in the choice of the bank
Fattori determinanti nella scelta della banca
Bank requests to assess creditworthiness
Richieste della banca per valutare l'affidabilità creditizia
Tools to improve credit position with banks
Strumenti per migliorare la posizione creditizia verso le banche
Percentage class of personnel involved in training
Classe (%) di personale coinvolto nella formazione
Expenditure in training activities state
Andamento della spesa per attività di formazione
Cause of limitation in expenditure or training absence
Motivi di limitazione nella spesa o di mancata formazione
Delocalisation mode via Foreign Direct Investment (FDI)
Modalità di delocalizzazione tramite investimenti diretti all'estero (IDE)
Areas of delocalization of the production activity via Foreign Direct Investment (FDI)
Aree di delocalizzazione dell'attività produttiva tramite investimenti diretti all'estero (IDE)
Destination of production realized abroad via Foreign Direct Investment (FDI)
Destinazione della produzione realizzata all'estero tramite investimenti diretti all'estero (IDE)
Areas of delocalization of the production activity via delocalisation agreements or contracts
Aree di delocalizzazione dell'attività produttiva tramite accordi o contratti
Destination of production carried out abroad via delocalisation agreements or contracts
Destinazione della produzione realizzata all'estero tramite accordi o contratti
Type of company to which a work/processing service has been provided
Tipologia di impresa cui è stato fornito un servizio di lavorazione/processing
Type of company to which a work/processing service has been commissioned
Tipologia di impresa cui è stato commissionato un servizio di lavorazione/processing
Areas of delocalization of the production activity
Aree di delocalizzazione dell'attività produttiva
Measures to improve occupational well-being and to guarantee equal opportunities within the company
Misure per migliorare il benessere lavorativo e garantire pari opportunità all’interno dell’impresa
Measures to support parenting and work-family balance in the last three years
Misure che sostengono la genitorialità intraprese nell'ultimo triennio
Measures to support parenting and work-family balance in the next three years
Misure che sostengono la genitorialità da intraprendere nel prossimo triennio
Assessment of measures for occupational well-being and/or initiatives of collective interest
Modalità di valutazione delle misure adottate per il benessere lavorativo nell'ultimo triennio
Assessment included in the social report or in another document made public
Inserimento della valutazione nel bilancio sociale o in altro documento reso pubblico
Initiatives to strengthen knowledge and competitive capacity of the actors present in the territory
Iniziative per rafforzare conoscenze e capacità competitiva degli attori presenti nel territorio
Factors for the success of the iniziative to promote the economic development of the territory
Fattori per il successo delle iniziative atte a promuovere lo sviluppo economico del territorio
Cause of the relevance for the safety aspects
Cause della rilevanza degli aspetti connessi alla sicurezza
Actions planned or carried out by the company to guarantee the various aspects of safety
Azioni programmate o realizzate dall’impresa per garantire i diversi aspetti della sicurezza
Main strengths of the company's competitive capacity
Punti di forza della capacità competitiva
Obstacles of the company's competitive capacity
Ostacoli alla capacità competitiva dell’impresa
Number of partners in the relations
Numero controparti negli accordi

Area geografica e paesi di cittadinanza

Nota - Area geografica e paesi di cittadinanza

Nota - Luogo di destinazione

Nota - Condizione professionale o non professionale

Numero di componenti in convivenza

Nota - Numero di componenti in convivenza

Criminalità nella zona in cui abita

Parenti su cui contare

Nota - Parenti su cui contare

Nota - Amici su cui contare

Nota - Vicini su cui contare

Nota - Sicurezza camminando al buio da soli nella zona in cui abitano

Luogo di dimora abituale 1 anno prima

Nota - Stato coniugale della coppia

Nota - Stato di occupazione

Nota - Luogo di nascita dei genitori
Note - Number of household members

Utilizzo di lavoro da casa

Periodo di attività svolto nell'impresa utilizzatrice
Age group of the surviving spouse
Classe di età coniuge superstite
Citizenship area and most relevant country
Aree di cittadinanza e principali paesi
Method of artificial reproductive technique used
Metodo di procreazione medicalmente assistita utilizzato
Reference period for doctor consultations or diagnostic tests
Periodo in cui è stata effettuata la visita o l'accertamento
Underlying cause of death - European Short List
Causa iniziale di morte - European Short List
Underlying cause of death - Short List
Causa iniziale di morte - Short List
Type of doctor consultations or diagnostic tests
Tipo visita o accertamento
Waiting days between certification and abortion
Giorni di attesa tra certificazione e intervento
Use of artificial reproductive techniques
Utilizzo di tecniche di procreazione medicalmente assistita
Age group of the surviving spouse
Classe di età coniuge superstite
Citizenship area and most relevant country
Aree di cittadinanza e principali paesi
Method of artificial reproductive technique used
Metodo di procreazione medicalmente assistita utilizzato
Reference period for doctor consultations or diagnostic tests
Periodo in cui è stata effettuata la visita o l'accertamento
Underlying cause of death - European Short List
Causa iniziale di morte - European Short List
Underlying cause of death - Short List
Causa iniziale di morte - Short List
Type of doctor consultations or diagnostic tests
Tipo visita o accertamento
Waiting days between certification and abortion
Giorni di attesa tra certificazione e intervento
Use of artificial reproductive techniques
Utilizzo di tecniche di procreazione medicalmente assistita
Educational level of main income earner
Titolo di studio del principale percettore
Highest level of education attained by the reference person
Titolo di studio conseguito dalla persona di riferimento
Including or not including imputed rents
Presenza affitti imputati
Professional condition of the reference person
Condizione professionale della persona di riferimento
Professional status of main income earner
Condizione professionale prevalente nell'anno del principale percettore
Educational level of main income earner
Titolo di studio del principale percettore
Highest level of education attained by the reference person
Titolo di studio conseguito dalla persona di riferimento
Including or not including imputed rents
Presenza affitti imputati
Professional condition of the reference person
Condizione professionale della persona di riferimento
Professional status of main income earner
Condizione professionale prevalente nell'anno del principale percettore
Note - Surface areas by intended use
Nota - Destinazione d'uso
Note - Useful floor area classes
Nota - Classe di superficie utile abitabile
Holder of the title to build
Richiedente il titolo abilitativo
Note - Holder of the title to build
Nota - Richiedente il titolo abilitativo
Activity limitation for at least 6 months
Limitazioni da almeno 6 mesi nelle attività
Age when the crime was committed
Età del condannato al momento del reato
Age when the most serious crime was committed
Età del condannato al momento del reato più grave
Labour and professional status of woman
Condizione professionale della donna
Stereotypes about gender roles, behaviours regarding intimate partner
Stereotipi sui ruoli di genere, comportamenti nella coppia
Time interval between enrollment date and definition date
Intervallo di tempo tra data di iscrizione e data di definizione
Time interval between the committed crime date and the sentence date
Intervallo di tempo tra data del reato e data della sentenza
Year when the crime was committed
Anno del commesso reato
Activity limitation for at least 6 months
Limitazioni da almeno 6 mesi nelle attività
Age when the crime was committed
Età del condannato al momento del reato
Age when the most serious crime was committed
Età del condannato al momento del reato più grave
Labour and professional status of woman
Condizione professionale della donna
Stereotypes about gender roles, behaviours regarding intimate partner
Stereotipi sui ruoli di genere, comportamenti nella coppia
Time interval between enrollment date and definition date
Intervallo di tempo tra data di iscrizione e data di definizione
Time interval between the committed crime date and the sentence date
Intervallo di tempo tra data del reato e data della sentenza
Year when the crime was committed
Anno del commesso reato
Age of the youngest child of the couple
Età del figlio più piccolo della coppia
Highest level of education attained by woman
Titolo di studio della donna
Main reason for not seeking employment
Motivo principale della mancata ricerca di lavoro
Number of children in the couple
Numero di figli nella coppia
Presence in the household of foreign members
Presenza in famiglia di stranieri
Presence in the household of retired persons
Presenza in famiglia di pensionati da lavoro
Presence in the household of unemployed persons or additional potential labour force
Presenza in famiglia di disoccupati/forze lavoro potenziali
Age of the youngest child of the couple
Età del figlio più piccolo della coppia
Highest level of education attained by woman
Titolo di studio della donna
Main reason for not seeking employment
Motivo principale della mancata ricerca di lavoro
Number of children in the couple
Numero di figli nella coppia
Presence in the household of foreign members
Presenza in famiglia di stranieri
Presence in the household of retired persons
Presenza in famiglia di pensionati da lavoro
Presence in the household of unemployed persons or additional potential labour force
Presenza in famiglia di disoccupati/forze lavoro potenziali
Husband age class at divorce
Classe di età del marito al divorzio
Husband age class at marriage
Classe di età del marito al matrimonio
Husband age class at separation
Classe di età del marito alla separazione
Wife age class at divorce
Classe di età della moglie al divorzio
Wife age class at marriage
Classe di età della moglie al matrimonio
Wife age class at separation
Classe di età della moglie alla separazione
Continent of foreign citizenship of birth
Cittadinanza estera del nato
Sector of economic activity bride (NACE 2007)
Settore di attività economica della sposa (Ateco 2007)
Sector of economic activity bridegroom (NACE 2007)
Settore di attività economica dello sposo (Ateco 2007)
First year of data publication
Primo anno di pubblicazione dei dati
Period between separation and filing of divorce proceedings
Periodo tra la separazione e l'iscrizione a ruolo del procedimento
Spouse who presented the petition for divorce with judicial proceeding
Coniuge che ha presentato la domanda di divorzio con rito giudiziale
Year of ending of previous marriage
Anno di cessazione precedente matrimonio
Husband age class at divorce
Classe di età del marito al divorzio
Husband age class at marriage
Classe di età del marito al matrimonio
Husband age class at separation
Classe di età del marito alla separazione
Wife age class at divorce
Classe di età della moglie al divorzio
Wife age class at marriage
Classe di età della moglie al matrimonio
Wife age class at separation
Classe di età della moglie alla separazione
Continent of foreign citizenship of birth
Cittadinanza estera del nato
Sector of economic activity bride (NACE 2007)
Settore di attività economica della sposa (Ateco 2007)
Sector of economic activity bridegroom (NACE 2007)
Settore di attività economica dello sposo (Ateco 2007)
First year of data publication
Primo anno di pubblicazione dei dati
Period between separation and filing of divorce proceedings
Periodo tra la separazione e l'iscrizione a ruolo del procedimento
Spouse who presented the petition for divorce with judicial proceeding
Coniuge che ha presentato la domanda di divorzio con rito giudiziale
Year of ending of previous marriage
Anno di cessazione precedente matrimonio
Number of grandparents still alive of the person interviewed
Numero di nonni in vita
Number of grandparents still alive of the person interviewed
Numero di nonni in vita
Fertility intentions within 3 years after the interview
Intenzione di avere figli nei 3 anni successivi l'intervista
Fertility intentions within 3 years after the interview
Intenzione di avere figli nei 3 anni successivi l'intervista
Fertility intentions in the future
Intenzione di avere figli in futuro
Fertility intentions in the future
Intenzione di avere figli in futuro
Chamber of commerce balance sheet
Stato patrimoniale delle camere di commercio
Chamber of commerce balance sheet
Stato patrimoniale delle camere di commercio
Country of registration of the vehicle
Territorio di immatricolazione automezzo
Size by number of rooms
Classe dimensionale per numero di camere
Country of registration of the vehicle
Territorio di immatricolazione automezzo
Size by number of rooms
Classe dimensionale per numero di camere
Accessibility
structure:Concept.common:Description: The ease and the conditions under which statistical information can be obtained.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Accuracy
structure:Concept.common:Description: Closeness of computations or estimates to the exact or true values that the statistics were intended to measure.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Accuracy - overall
structure:Concept.common:Description: Assessment of accuracy, linked to a certain data set or domain, which is summarising the various components into one single measure.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Accuracy - nonsampling error
structure:Concept.common:Description: Error in sample estimates which cannot be attributed to sampling fluctuations.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Accuracy - sampling error
structure:Concept.common:Description: That part of the difference between a population value and an estimate thereof, derived from a random sample, which is due to the fact that only a subset of the population is enumerated.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Adjustment
structure:Concept.common:Description: The set of procedures employed to modify statistical data to enable it to conform to national or international standards or to address data quality differences when compiling specific data sets.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Adjustment - coded
structure:Concept.common:Description: Type of adjustment used, represented by a code.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Adjustment - detail
structure:Concept.common:Description: Textual description of the type of adjustment used.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Age
structure:Concept.common:Description: The length of time that a person has lived or a thing has existed.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Base Period
structure:Concept.common:Description: The period of time used as the base of an index number, or to which a constant price series refers.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Civil Status
structure:Concept.common:Description: Legal, conjugal status of each individual in relation to the marriage laws or customs of the country.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Clarity
structure:Concept.common:Description: The extent to which easily comprehensible metadata are available, where these metadata are necessary to give a full understanding of statistical data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Classification systems
structure:Concept.common:Description: Arrangement or division of objects into groups based on characteristics which the objects have in common.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Coherence
structure:Concept.common:Description: Adequacy of statistics to be combined in different ways and for various uses.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Coherence - cross domain
structure:Concept.common:Description: Extent to which statistics are reconcilable with those obtained through other data sources or statistical domains.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Coherence - Internal
structure:Concept.common:Description: Extent to which statistics are consistent within a given data set.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Comment
structure:Concept.common:Description: Supplementary descriptive text which can be attached to data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Comparability
structure:Concept.common:Description: The extent to which differences between statistics can be attributed to differences between the true values of the statistical characteristics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Comparability - between domains
structure:Concept.common:Description: Extent to which statistics are comparable between different statistical domains.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Comparability - geographical
structure:Concept.common:Description: Extent to which statistics are comparable between geographical areas.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Comparability - over time
structure:Concept.common:Description: Extent to which statistics are comparable or reconcilable over time.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Compiling agency
structure:Concept.common:Description: The organisation compiling the data being reported.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Confidentiality
structure:Concept.common:Description: A property of data indicating the extent to which their unauthorised disclosure could be prejudicial or harmful to the interest of the source or other relevant parties.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Confidentiality - data treatment
structure:Concept.common:Description: Rules applied for treating the data set to ensure statistical confidentiality and prevent unauthorised disclosure.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Confidentiality - policy
structure:Concept.common:Description: Legislative measures or other formal procedures which prevent unauthorised disclosure of data that identify a person or economic entity either directly or indirectly.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Confidentiality - status
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information about the confidentiality status of the object to which this attribute is attached.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact
structure:Concept.common:Description: Individual or organisational contact points for the data or metadata, including information on how to reach the contact points.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact email address
structure:Concept.common:Description: E-mail address of the contact points for the data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact fax number
structure:Concept.common:Description: Fax number of the contact points for the data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact mail address
structure:Concept.common:Description: The postal address of the contact points for the data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact name
structure:Concept.common:Description: The name of the contact points for the data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact organisation
structure:Concept.common:Description: The name of the organisation of the contact points for the data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact organization unit
structure:Concept.common:Description: An addressable subdivision of an organization.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact person job title
structure:Concept.common:Description: The area of technical responsibility of the contact, such as "methodology", "database management" or "dissemination".

structure:Concept.common:Name: Contact phone number
structure:Concept.common:Description: The telephone number of the contact points for the data or metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Cost and Burden
structure:Concept.common:Description: Costs associated with the collection and production of a statistical product and burden on respondents.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Cost and Burden - efficiency management
structure:Concept.common:Description: Cost benefit analysis, effectiveness of execution of medium term statistical programs, and ensuring efficient use of resources.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Cost and Burden - resources
structure:Concept.common:Description: Staff, facilities, computing resources, and financing to undertake statistical production.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Counterpart Reference Area
structure:Concept.common:Description: The secondary area, as opposed to reference area, to which the measured data is in relation.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Coverage
structure:Concept.common:Description: The definition of the population that statistics aim to cover.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Coverage - sector
structure:Concept.common:Description: Main economic or other sectors covered by the statistics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Coverage- time
structure:Concept.common:Description: The length of time for which data are available.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Currency
structure:Concept.common:Description: Monetary denomination of the object being measured.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Collection Method
structure:Concept.common:Description: Systematic process of gathering data for official statistics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Compilation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Operations performed on data to derive new information according to a given set of rules.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Dissemination Agency
structure:Concept.common:Description: The organisation disseminating the data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Editing
structure:Concept.common:Description: Activity aimed at detecting and correcting errors, logical inconsistencies and suspicious data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Presentation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Description of the disseminated data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Presentation - data description
structure:Concept.common:Description: Main characteristics of the data set described in an easily understandable manner, referring to the data and indicators disseminated.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Presentation - disseminated detail
structure:Concept.common:Description: Disseminated domain, measure, and time period breakdowns of statistics in the dataset.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Provider
structure:Concept.common:Description: Organisation which produces data or metadata

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Revision
structure:Concept.common:Description: Any change in a value of a statistic released to the public.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Revision - policy
structure:Concept.common:Description: Policy aimed at ensuring the transparency of disseminated data, whereby preliminary data are compiled that are later revised.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Revision - practice
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information on the data revision practice.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Revision - studies
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information about data revision studies and analyses.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Set Identifier
structure:Concept.common:Description: Sequence of characters identifying the data set with which it is associated.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Update
structure:Concept.common:Description: The date on which the data element was inserted or modified in the database.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Validation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Process of monitoring the results of data compilation and ensuring the quality of the statistical results.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Validation - intermediate
structure:Concept.common:Description: Validation that intermediate calculations leading to statistical outputs have been correctly done.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Validation - output
structure:Concept.common:Description: Assessment of discrepancies and other problems in statistical outputs.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data Validation - source
structure:Concept.common:Description: Assessment of discrepancies and other problems related to source data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Decimals
structure:Concept.common:Description: The number of digits of an observation to the right of a decimal point.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dissemination Format
structure:Concept.common:Description: Media by which statistical data and metadata are disseminated.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dissemination Format - mirco-data access
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information on whether micro-data are also disseminated.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dissemination Format - news release
structure:Concept.common:Description: Regular or ad-hoc press releases linked to the data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dissemination Format - online database
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information about on-line databases in which the disseminated data can be accessed.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dissemination Format - other
structure:Concept.common:Description: References to the most important other data dissemination done.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dissemination Format - publications
structure:Concept.common:Description: Regular or ad-hoc publications in which the data are made available to the public.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Documentation on methodology
structure:Concept.common:Description: Descriptive text and references to methodological documents available.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Documentation on methodology - advance notice
structure:Concept.common:Description: Policy on notifying the public of changes in methodology, indicating whether the public is notified before a methodological change affects disseminated data and, if so, how long before.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Education Level
structure:Concept.common:Description: The highest level of an educational programme the person has successfully completed.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Embargo Time
structure:Concept.common:Description: The exact time at which the data could be made available to the public.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency
structure:Concept.common:Description: The time interval at which observations occur over a given time period.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency Detail
structure:Concept.common:Description: A further specification of the frequency to include more detailed information about the type of frequency and frequencies not commonly used.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency of data collection
structure:Concept.common:Description: Frequency with which the source data are collected.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency of dissemination
structure:Concept.common:Description: The time interval at which the statistics are disseminated over a given time period.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Grossing/Netting
structure:Concept.common:Description: Form of consolidation used in presenting the data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Index Type
structure:Concept.common:Description: The type of index number used in the statistical production process.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Institutional Mandate
structure:Concept.common:Description: Set of rules or other formal set of instructions assigning responsibility as well as the authority to an organisation for the collection, processing, and dissemination of statistics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Institutional Mandate - data sharing
structure:Concept.common:Description: Arrangements or procedures for data sharing and coordination between data producing agencies.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Institutional Mandate - legal acts and other agreements.
structure:Concept.common:Description: Legal acts or other formal or informal agreements that assign responsibility as well as the authority to an agency for the collection, processing, and dissemination of statistics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Institutional Mandate - respondent relations.
structure:Concept.common:Description: Measures to encourage statistical reporting and/or to sanction non-reporting.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Maintenance Agency
structure:Concept.common:Description: The organisation or other expert body that maintains a domain-specific data or metadata structure definition.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Metadata Update
structure:Concept.common:Description: The date on which the metadata element was inserted or modified in the database.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Metadata Update - last certified
structure:Concept.common:Description: Date of the latest certification provided by the domain manager to confirm that the metadata posted are still up-to-date, even if the content has not been amended.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Metadata Update - last posted
structure:Concept.common:Description: Date of the latest dissemination of the metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Metadata Update - last update
structure:Concept.common:Description: Date of last update of the content of the metadata.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation
structure:Concept.common:Description: The value of a particular variable at a particular period.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation Pre-break Value
structure:Concept.common:Description: The observation, at a time series break period, that was calculated using the old methodology.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation Status
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information on the quality of a value or an unusual or missing value.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Occupation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Job or position held by an individual who performs a set of tasks and duties.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Original Data Identifier
structure:Concept.common:Description: The data identifier as found in the originating database.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Professionalism
structure:Concept.common:Description: The standard, skill and ability suitable for producing statistics of good quality.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Professionalism - code of conduct
structure:Concept.common:Description: Provision for assuring the qualifications of staff and allowing staff to perform their functions without intervention motivated by non-statistical objectives.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Professionalism - impartiality
structure:Concept.common:Description: Description of the elements providing assurances that statistics are produced on an impartial basis.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Professionalism - methodology
structure:Concept.common:Description: Describes the elements providing assurances that the choices of sources and statistical techniques as well as decisions about dissemination are informed solely by statistical considerations.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Professionalism - statistical commentary
structure:Concept.common:Description: Describes the elements providing assurances that the statistical entity is entitled to comment on erroneous interpretation and misuse of statistics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Punctuality
structure:Concept.common:Description: Time lag between the actual delivery of the data and the target date when it should have been delivered.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Quality Management
structure:Concept.common:Description: Systems and frameworks in place within an organisation to manage the quality of statistical products and processes.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Quality Management - assessment
structure:Concept.common:Description: Overall assessment of data quality, based on standard quality criteria.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Quality Management - assurance
structure:Concept.common:Description: Guidelines focusing on quality in general and dealing with quality of statistical programmes, including measures for ensuring the efficient use of resources.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Quality Management - documentation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Documentation on procedures applied for quality management and quality assessment.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Recording Basis
structure:Concept.common:Description: Processes and standards employed in calculating statistical aggregates.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference Area
structure:Concept.common:Description: The country or geographic area to which the measured statistical phenomenon relates.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference Period
structure:Concept.common:Description: The period of time or point in time to which the measured observation is intended to refer.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference Period - weights
structure:Concept.common:Description: Dates or periods to which the observations used to compile the weights refer.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy
structure:Concept.common:Description: Rules for disseminating statistical data to interested parties.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy - legal acts and other agreements
structure:Concept.common:Description: Legal acts and other agreements pertaining to data access.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy - policy commentary
structure:Concept.common:Description: Legal acts and other agreements pertaining to data access.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy - release calendar
structure:Concept.common:Description: The schedule of statistical release dates.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy - release calendar access
structure:Concept.common:Description: Access to the release calendar information.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy - transparency
structure:Concept.common:Description: Dissemination of the release policy to the public.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Release Policy - user access
structure:Concept.common:Description: The policy for release of the data to users, the scope of dissemination (eg, to the public, to selected users), how users are informed that the data are being released, and whether the policy provides determines the dissemination of statistical data to all users.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Relevance
structure:Concept.common:Description: The degree to which statistical information meets the real or perceived needs of clients.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Relevance - Completeness
structure:Concept.common:Description: The extent to which all statistics that are needed are available.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Relevance - user needs
structure:Concept.common:Description: Description of users and their respective needs with respect to the statistical data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Relevance - user satisifaction
structure:Concept.common:Description: Measure to determine user satisfaction.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reporting Agency
structure:Concept.common:Description: The organisation that supplies the data for a given instance of the statistics.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Sampling
structure:Concept.common:Description: The process of selecting a number of cases from all the cases in a particular group or universe.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Sex
structure:Concept.common:Description: The state of being male or female.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Source Data
structure:Concept.common:Description: Characteristics and components of the raw statistical data used for compiling statistical aggregates.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Statistical Concepts and Definitions
structure:Concept.common:Description: Statistical characteristics of statistical observations.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Statistical Population
structure:Concept.common:Description: The total membership or population or "universe" of a defined class of people, objects or events.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Statistical Unit
structure:Concept.common:Description: Entity for which information is sought and for which statistics are ultimately compiled.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time Format
structure:Concept.common:Description: Technical format in which time is represented for the measured phenomenon.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time Period
structure:Concept.common:Description: The period of time or point in time to which the measured observation refers.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time Period - collection
structure:Concept.common:Description: Dates or periods during which the observations have been collected (such as middle, average or end of period) to compile the indicator for the target reference period.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Timelinesst
structure:Concept.common:Description: Length of time between data availability and the event or phenomenon they describe.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Timeliness - output
structure:Concept.common:Description: The lapse of time between the end of a reference period and dissemination of the data.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Timeliness - source data
structure:Concept.common:Description: The time between the end of a reference period and actual receipt of the data by the compiling agency.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Title
structure:Concept.common:Description: Textual label used as identification of a statistical object.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Unit Multiplier
structure:Concept.common:Description: Exponent in base 10 specified so that multiplying the observation numeric values by 10^UNIT_MULT gives a value expressed in the UNIT.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Unit of Measure
structure:Concept.common:Description: The unit in which the data values are measured.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Unit of Measure Detail
structure:Concept.common:Description: Additional textual information on the unit of measure.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Valuation
structure:Concept.common:Description: The definition of the price per unit, for goods and services flows and asset stocks.
